verificationNote: These entries were reconstructed from a third-party Oscar-nominations database and a German-language Wikipedia article, cross-checked against each other. Neither is the Academy's own site. D-014 requires checking oscars.org directly before this page is published — do not treat this file as launch-ready.

citations.citation: For the engineering and development of a high-speed re-recording system for motion picture production.
citations.type: Scientific/Technical Award (Academy Award for Technical Achievement)

citations.citation: For the introduction of the first remotely controlled Advance/Retard function for magnetic film sound dubbing.

relatedIndividualAwards.note: These went to individuals associated with the company's early history, not to the company itself — keep the distinction clear on the page.

entries.citation: For the development of an Electronically Controlled Looping System.
